title: YouTube disabled my comments on my vlog channel. My plan for retaliation.

enrichment.summary: Kyle explains that YouTube disabled comments on his vlog channel after he designated it as a kids channel under new FCC rules. He outlines his 'retaliation' plan: renaming every video title to demand his comments back, messaging YouTube daily, and parking his painted van outside the Google Boulder office with a message demanding his comments be restored. He also reflects on free speech, TikTok, and the absurdity of removing comments.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Unjust and anti-free-speech; comments must be on
Confused and frustrated by the rule; thinks it makes no sense
Freedom of speech means speaking to others, not just yourself — comments are essential
Disturbing; sees it as suppression of speech disguised as entertainment
Fully justified and entirely legal; plans to pursue it persistently
